# Muhammed Abdulhadi - Portfolio

## About
Muhammed Abdulhadi is a software developer focused on building clean, practical web products and sharing open-source work on GitHub.

## Core Stack
- JavaScript / TypeScript
- React / Next.js
- Tailwind CSS
- Node.js

## Projects
- Portfolio and product-focused web applications
- AI-assisted and developer-tooling experiments
- Open-source repositories on GitHub

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/mrglasswillbreak
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/muhammed-abdulhadi-7b9ba2278
- X: https://x.com/mrglaswontbreak

## Site Structure
- `/`: Main portfolio landing page
- `/resume`: Resume viewer and download section
